zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Stafford於1428年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，他的父親Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham26歲，母親Anne Neville19歲。他和Mrs Edward De Stafford III至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1484年在英國享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Stafford于1428年出生在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德时，他的父亲Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham26岁，母亲Anne Neville19岁。他和Mrs Edward De Stafford III至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1484年在英国享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Stafford was born in 1428, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, his father, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, was 26 and his mother, Anne Neville, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mrs Edward De Stafford III. He died in 1484, in England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Stafford est né en 1428, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Neville, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs Edward De Stafford III. Il est décédé en 1484, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Stafford 1428 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham 26 und seine Mutter Anne Neville 19. Er hatte mit Mrs Edward De Stafford III mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1484 im Alter von 56 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Stafford è nato il nel 1428 nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne Neville, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Mrs Edward De Stafford III. Morì nel 1484, nel England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Staffordが1428年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで生まれた時，父Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckinghamは26歳，母Anne Nevilleは19歳であった。彼はMrs Edward De Stafford IIIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1484年にイギリスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Stafford(이)가 1428년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Neville(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Mrs Edward De Stafford III(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 영국에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Stafford nasceu em 1428, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Neville, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Mrs Edward De Stafford III. Ele faleceu em 1484, em Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Stafford родился в 1428 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Neville, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Mrs Edward De Stafford III. Он умер в 1484 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Stafford nació en 1428, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Neville, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Mrs Edward De Stafford III. Murió en 1484, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
